zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII於1023年10月23日出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安波爾斯時，他的父親Guillaume V duc d'Aquitaine54歲，母親Agnès de Bourgogne27歲。他於1068年與Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1052年在法國被列為duke of gascony。他去世於1086年9月25日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯澤享年62歲，埋葬在法國努維勒-阿吉泰維安波爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII于1023年10月23日出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安波爾斯时，他的父亲Guillaume V duc d'Aquitaine54岁，母亲Agnès de Bourgogne27岁。他于1068年与Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine在法国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1052年在法国被列为duke of gascony。他去世于1086年9月25日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰多武-瑟艾福雷斯澤享年62岁，埋葬在法国努維勒-阿吉泰維安波爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: 'William'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII was born on 23 October 1023, in Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Guillaume V duc d'Aquitaine, was 54 and his mother, Agnès de Bourgogne, was 27. He married Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine in 1068, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1052, at the age of 29, his occupation is listed as duke of gascony in France. He died on 25 September 1086, in Chizé, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 62, and was buried in Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII est né le 23 octobre 1023, à Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Guillaume V duc d'Aquitaine, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Bourgogne, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine en 1068, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1052, à l’âge de 29 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est duke of gascony à France. Il est décédé le 25 septembre 1086, à Chizé, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

de.Maillezais, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Fr: Maillezais, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII am 23. Oktober 1023 in Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume V duc d'Aquitaine 54 und seine Mutter Agnès de Bourgogne 27. Er hat 1068 in Frankreich Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1052, als er 29 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als duke of gascony in Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. September 1086 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Chizé, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich und wurde in Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII è nato il il 23 ottobre 1023 nel Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume V duc d'Aquitaine, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Agnès de Bourgogne, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine nel 1068, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1052, all'età di 29 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come duke of gascony nel Francia. Morì il 25 settembre 1086, nel Chizé, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIIIが1023年10月23日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンポイティエルズで生まれた時，父Guillaume V duc d'Aquitaineは54歳，母Agnès de Bourgogneは27歳であった。1068年にフランスでHildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1052年，29歳の時，フランスでの職業はduke of gasconyと記録されている。彼は1086年9月25日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインデウクス-スevレスチズeで62歳で死去し，フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインヴィエンポイティエルズにて埋葬された。

ko.Maillezais, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Fr: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 븐드e 메이레제이
ko.lifeSummary: Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII(이)가 1023년 10월 23일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 포이티어스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume V duc d'Aquitaine(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de Bourgogne(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1068년 프랑스에서 Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1052년, 29세의 나이로 그의 직업은 프랑스에서 duke of gascony이었다. 그는 1086년 9월 25일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 데우스-스e브레스 치즈e에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 비니 포이티어스에 묻혔다.

pt.Maillezais, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Fr: Maillezais, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII nasceu em 23 de outubro de 1023, em Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Guillaume V duc d'Aquitaine, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Bourgogne, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine em 1068, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1052, com 29 anos, sua profissão aparece como duke of gascony em França. Ele faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1086, em Chizé, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França.

ru.Maillezais, Vendée, Pays de la Loire, Fr: меиллезеи, вендe, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII родился 23 октября 1023 г. в местности поитиирс, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume V duc d'Aquitaine было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Bourgogne, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine в 1068 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1052 году, в возрасте 29 лет,  он работал по профессии duke of gascony в местности Франция. Он умер 25 сентября 1086 г. в местности чизe, деукс-сeвресь, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности поитиирс, виенн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy 'William' d'Aquitaine VIII nació el 23 de octubre de 1023, en Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Guillaume V duc d'Aquitaine, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Agnès de Bourgogne, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Hildegarde de Bourgogne duchesse d'Aquitaine en 1068, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1052, a la edad de 29 años, su ocupación registrada era duke of gascony en Francia. Murió el 25 de septiembre de 1086, en Chizé, Deux-Sèvres, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Poitiers, Vienne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.
